name: Cultural Artifact
text:
This card may be exchanged as part of a transaction.
When an agenda is revealed: Discard this card and that agenda to reveal 1 agenda from the top of the deck. Players vote on this agenda instead.

name: Hazardous Artifact
text:
This card may be exchanged as part of a transaction.
After a round of ground combat on a planet you do not control: Discard this card to force your opponent's units into coexistence.

name: Industrial Artifact
text:
This card may be exchanged as part of a transaction.
After you produce a unit: Discard this card to gain 3 commodities, or spend 2 commodities or 2 trade goods to research that unit's unit upgrade technology.

name: Unknown Artifact
text:
This card may be exchanged as part of a transaction.
After a player activates a system: Discard this card; until the end of this tactical action, the active player treats the move value of each of their ships as 1.

name: Superweapon Availyn
text: This system is a nebula. At any time, you may exhaust this card to produce up to 3 fighters in a system that contains your ships. PRODUCTION 3
notes: You must be participating in the combat to place the fighters.

name: Superweapon Caled
text: During combat, if a straight line between the center of this system and the center of the active system would cross only parallel non-anomaly borders, you may exhaust this card to destroy 1 ship in that system.
notes: You must be participating in the combat. Cannot hit its own system. Treats hyperlanes as empties for purposes of line drawing.

name: Superweapon Glatison
text: At any time, you may exhaust this card to repair all of your damaged units. Up to 5 fighters in this system do not count against your ships’ capacity.ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE 4(x2).
notes: The ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE is not automated.

name: Superweapon Grom
text: At any time, you may exhaust this card to resolve ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE 4 against each fighter in 1 adjacent system (including your own).

name: Superweapon Mors
text: At any time, you may exhaust this card to force each unit in 1 non-adjacent system to become damaged, if able. PLANETARY SHIELD

name: Aend's Torch
text: After you activate a system, you may exhaust this card to place 1 neutral ship in that system’s space area that has a cost value less than the number of victory points you have. Then, resolve space combat in that system.

name: Matjek's Dragon Cage
text: ACTION: Choose a planet in a system that contains your ships; destroy and capture all units on that planet, and gain up to 1 non-faction technology owned by any player whose units you captured. Then, purge this card.

name: Gedu Station
text: When you gain this card, place or move the Gedu station token into a non-home system that contains your ships. This card is also the Gedu station card. 3 / 3

name: Kadlin's Staff
text: You may exhaust this card at the end of your turn to choose 1 player; that player may spend 1 token from their strategy pool to gain the alliance ability of a random, unused faction.

name: The Antipode
text: ACTION: Purge this card to ready or unlock up to 3 components that aren't strategy cards and place the Entropic Scar token in a system that contains or is adjacent to your units.

name: Taranis Crest
text:
After you gain control of a planet from another player, you may place 1 infantry from that player's reinforcements into coexistence on that planet.
Apply +1 to the resource and influence values of planets you control that contain coexisting units.
